import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def meta_bar(labels, values):
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.bar(labels, values)
    ax.set_ylim(0, max(values) * 1.2)
    out = {"n_bars": len(values), "ylim0": ax.get_ylim()[0] == 0}
    plt.close(fig)
    return out
print(meta_bar(["A", "B"], [3, 4]))

def classify_claim(text):
    return "PERMITIDO" if "muestra" in text else "RECHAZADO"
print(classify_claim("Lima lidera en la muestra web"))
